---
title: "Player Projections"
---

## Player Projections

This page will display model outputs and projections.

```{html}
<div class="projection-controls">
  <div class="projection-button-row">
    <button class="proj-btn active" data-table="transfer">Transfer Likelihood</button>
    <button class="proj-btn" data-table="returnleave">Return / Leave</button>
    <button class="proj-btn" data-table="destination">Destination Tier</button>
    <button class="proj-btn" data-table="bpm">Projected BPM</button>
  </div>

  <div id="projection-table-wrapper">
    <table id="projectionTable" class="display nowrap" style="width:100%"></table>
  </div>
</div>
```
